source_pr.title: ddl: cleanup redundant globally settings for tests
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #32673

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: // this test file include some test that will cause data race, mainly because restartWorkers modify d.ctx
failure_signature: // this test file include some test that will cause data race, mainly because restartWorkers modify d.ctx
root_cause_explanation: The DDL test suite mutates and initializes global/shared state (e.g., `config.UpdateGlobal`, `autoid.SetStep`, `ReorgWaitTimeout`, `infosync.GlobalInfoSyncerInit`) across multiple test entrypoints/files, which can cause cross-test interference and flaky behavior. The patch stabilizes the suite by removing redundant per-file global setup and centralizing shared initialization in `TestMain`, reducing shared-state pollution between tests.
fix_pattern: Avoid scattered global config/initializer mutations across test files; centralize shared setup in `TestMain` and ensure global state is initialized once (or restored) to reduce cross-test interference.

evidence: evidence: // this test file include some test that will cause data race, mainly because restartWorkers modify d.ctx

files: ddl/column_change_test.go, ddl/column_test.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, ddl/foreign_key_test.go, ddl/index_change_test.go, ddl/integration_test.go, ddl/main_test.go, ddl/placement_policy_ddl_test.go, ddl/reorg_test.go, ddl/restart_test.go, ddl/stat_test.go
